name: Windows Defender Exclusion List Modified
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @BarryShooshooga
SIGMA Title: Windows Defender Exclusion List Modified
SIGMA Description: Detects modifications to the Windows Defender exclusion registry key. This could indicate a potentially suspicious or even malicious activity by an attacker trying to add a new exclusion in order to bypass security.


False positives:
- Intended exclusions by administrators

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4657 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Windows Defender Exclusion List Modified on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4657 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Windows Defender Exclusion List Modified
